name: Almonty Industries Inc.
description: Almonty Industries is a global tungsten mining company operating mines in Portugal (Panasqueira), Spain (Los Santos), and South Korea (Sangdong). The flagship Sangdong mine in South Korea's Gangwon Province — historically one of the world's largest and highest-grade tungsten deposits — completed Phase 1 commissioning in March 2026, returning to production after more than 30 years. The company is in an active production and expansion stage, positioned to supply a significant share of global non-China tungsten supply.
